release_notes.fr:
Sélection de Raid : Correction du système de sélection des raids.
Sécurité : Nouvelle méthode de compilation des macros pour éviter la détection par Windows Defender.
Stabilité : Correction de la boucle infinie de l'icône "Diamond" dans certaines circonstances.
release_notes.en:
Raid Selection: Fixed issues with the raid selection system.
Security: Implemented a different compilation method for macros to prevent Windows Defender detection.
Stability: Fixed the "Diamond" loop occurring under specific circumstances.
release_notes.es:
Raid Selection: Fixed issues with the raid selection system.
Security: Implemented a different compilation method for macros to prevent Windows Defender detection.
Stability: Fixed the "Diamond" loop occurring under specific circumstances.
